GET /health.description: Returns the current health status of the API. No authentication required. Use this to verify API connectivity.

POST /v1/auth/login.description: Authenticates a user with Firebase credentials and returns session information including user role and profile.

PATCH /v1/admins/email/{uid}.description: Updates the email address for an admin user identified by their Firebase UID.

parameters.uid: Firebase UID of the admin user (e.g., 'abc123def456').

PATCH /v1/admins/{uid}.description: Updates profile fields for an admin user. All fields are optional — only included fields are updated.

parameters.uid: Firebase UID of the admin user.

POST /v1/agents/get-opportunities.description: Retrieves deal opportunities for a specific agent. Supports pagination, filtering by deal type, date range, and status.

parameters.agentId: HubSpot contact ID for the agent.
parameters.after: Cursor for pagination — pass the last opportunity ID from the previous page.
parameters.isLost: When true, returns only lost/closed opportunities. Defaults to false.
parameters.startDate: Unix timestamp (ms) — only return opportunities created on or after this date.
parameters.separateByDealType: When true, groups results by deal type.

POST /v1/agents/search.description: Search for agents by name, email, or other criteria. Returns a paginated list.

parameters.search: Query string — matches agent name, email, or brokerage.
parameters.limit: Max results to return. Defaults to 25.

GET /v1/agents/{agentId}.description: Retrieves a single agent record by their unique agent ID.

parameters.agentId: HubSpot contact ID for the agent.

GET /v1/app-config/feature-flags/{app}.description: Returns all active feature flags for the specified application platform.

GET /v1/app-config/{app}.description: Returns the full application configuration including feature flags, UI settings, and environment values.

PATCH /v1/app-config/{app}.description: Updates configuration values for the specified platform. Only included fields are modified.

POST /v1/app-config/{app}.description: Creates a new configuration entry for the specified platform.

POST /v1/avm.description: Runs an automated valuation model (AVM) for a property address. Returns estimated value based on comparables, market trends, and property data.

POST /v1/broadcast/email.description: Sends an email broadcast to a targeted list of recipients.

POST /v1/broadcast/push-notification.description: Sends a push notification to a group of users across mobile and web.

POST /v1/broadcast/sms.description: Sends an SMS broadcast message to a list of phone numbers.

GET /v1/broadcast/templates.description: Returns available broadcast message templates for email, SMS, and push.

POST /v1/broadcast/templates.description: Creates a new broadcast message template.

POST /v1/brokerages/.description: Creates a new real estate brokerage record.

GET /v1/brokerages/.description: Returns all registered brokerages with optional filtering and pagination.

POST /v1/brokerages/search.description: Searches brokerages by name, location, or other criteria.

GET /v1/brokerages/{brokerageId}.description: Retrieves a single brokerage record by ID.

PATCH /v1/brokerages/{brokerageId}.description: Updates fields on an existing brokerage record.

POST /v1/brokerages/{brokerageId}/agents.description: Associates an agent with a brokerage.

POST /v1/case-studies/.description: Creates a new case study from a completed deal for marketing materials and the website.

POST /v1/contacts/.description: Creates a new contact record. Contacts can be associated with deals and opportunities. Syncs to HubSpot.

POST /v1/contacts/search.description: Search for contacts by name, email, phone, or other fields. Returns paginated results.

GET /v1/contacts/{contactId}.description: Retrieves a contact by ID, including associated deals and opportunities.

PATCH /v1/contacts/{contactId}.description: Updates fields on an existing contact. Only included fields are modified.

POST /v1/contacts/{contactId}/intake-url.description: Generates a unique intake URL for a contact to begin the property assessment process.

POST /v1/contractors/.description: Creates a new contractor profile. Contractors are assigned to renovation projects and can submit weekly updates.

GET /v1/contractors/.description: Returns all registered contractors with optional filtering.

POST /v1/contractors/search.description: Searches contractors by name, company, specialty, or location.

GET /v1/contractors/{contractorId}.description: Retrieves a contractor profile by ID, including assigned projects and status.

PATCH /v1/contractors/{contractorId}.description: Updates fields on a contractor profile.

GET /v1/contractors/{contractorId}/dashb.description: Returns dashboard data for a contractor including active projects, milestones, and performance metrics.

POST /v1/contractors/{contractorId}/dash.description: Updates or refreshes dashboard metrics for a contractor.

POST /v1/contracts/.description: Creates a new contract document via PandaDoc. Returns the contract ID and edit session.

GET /v1/contracts/{contractId}.description: Retrieves a contract document by ID including status, recipients, and signing info.

PATCH /v1/contracts/{contractId}.description: Updates metadata or status on an existing contract.

POST /v1/contracts/{contractId}/send.description: Sends the contract to all recipients for e-signature via PandaDoc.

GET /v1/contracts/{contractId}/signing-l.description: Returns direct signing links for each contract recipient.

GET /v1/contracts/{contractId}/download.description: Downloads the contract document as a PDF.

GET /v1/contracts/{contractId}/edit-sess.description: Creates or retrieves an edit session for the contract, allowing modifications before sending.

DELETE /v1/contracts/{contractId}.description: Deletes a contract document. Only draft contracts can be deleted.

POST /v2/deals/.description: Creates a new deal in the HubSpot pipeline. Deals are routed to the appropriate pipeline and stage based on deal type.

parameters.dealname: Display name, typically the property address.

POST /v1/esignatures/document-status.description: Checks the current signing status of a PandaDoc document and syncs to HubSpot.
